name: Healthgrades Provider Data and Patient Acquisition API
what_it_does: Healthgrades provider data and patient acquisition REST API for healthcare systems, health plans, and digital health companies to access physician directory data, hospital quality ratings, patient reviews, appointment booking integration, and healthcare consumer data — enabling automated provider directory management, physician search integration, patient appointment scheduling, and healthcare digital marketing through Healthgrades' comprehensive physician and hospital database covering 3M+ US healthcare providers. Enables AI agents to manage provider search for physician and hospital directory automation, handle appointment booking for patient scheduling integration automation, access quality ratings for hospital and physician performance data automation, retrieve patient reviews for healthcare consumer insight automation, manage provider profiles for healthcare organization data management automation, handle healthcare marketing for digital patient acquisition automation, access specialty filtering for care navigation automation, retrieve insurance acceptance for patient provider matching automation, manage location search for geographic care access automation, and integrate Healthgrades with EHR platforms, patient portals, and health system websites for provider discovery and patient access automation.
use_cases: Integrating physician directory and search for health system website and patient portal automation agents
Accessing hospital quality ratings and physician credentials for healthcare consumer navigation automation agents
Connecting appointment booking with Healthgrades provider profiles for patient acquisition automation agents
Managing health plan provider directory with Healthgrades physician data for network accuracy automation agents
not_for: Clinical decision support or EHR clinical data (Healthgrades is consumer-facing provider directory, not clinical system)
Health plan claims and billing (Healthgrades is provider discovery and marketing, not payment processing)
Non-US healthcare markets (Healthgrades focuses on US healthcare provider database)
best_when: A health system, health plan, or digital health company wanting AI agents to integrate physician directory data, hospital quality ratings, and patient appointment booking through Healthgrades' comprehensive US healthcare provider database.
avoid_when: ENTERPRISE CONTRACT REQUIRED: Healthgrades API access requires enterprise data licensing agreement; automated public API access assumption creates no available endpoint; automated must establish Healthgrades enterprise data partnership. HIPAA CONSIDERATIONS FOR PATIENT DATA: Any integration involving patient-identifiable appointment or review data requires HIPAA compliance; automated non-HIPAA implementation assumption creates compliance gap; automated must implement appropriate HIPAA safeguards for patient data. DATA ACCURACY LIMITATIONS: Healthgrades provider data depends on NPI registry and self-reported information; automated 100% data accuracy assumption creates outdated provider information; automated must implement data freshness validation and provider data update workflows. REVIEW DATA IS CONSUMER-GENERATED: Patient reviews on Healthgrades reflect consumer perspectives, not clinical quality measures; automated equating review scores with clinical quality assumption creates misleading provider comparison.

auth.notes: Healthgrades uses API key for provider directory API authentication. REST API with JSON. Denver, CO HQ. Founded 1998, acquired by RVO Health 2022. Products: Provider directory, quality ratings, patient reviews, appointment booking, healthcare marketing. SDKs: None public. 3M+ US healthcare providers. Consumer-facing provider search. BAA available for PHI. Competes with Zocdoc and WebMD for online healthcare consumer services.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No public free tier; enterprise data licensing required
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual enterprise data licensing; per-API-call for high-volume; healthcare marketing packages
pricing.notes: Denver CO. RVO Health (acquired 2022). Enterprise data licensing. 3M+ US providers. Healthcare consumer platform.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; provider search and directory APIs throttled

known_agent_gotchas: DATA FRESHNESS VARIES: Healthgrades provider data depends on NPI registry updates and provider self-reporting; automated real-time accuracy assumption creates stale data for providers who haven't updated profiles; automated must implement data freshness indicators and update workflows

NPI IS STANDARD IDENTIFIER: Healthgrades uses NPI (National Provider Identifier) for provider identification; automated proprietary ID assumption creates provider mapping issues; automated must use NPI for provider lookups and cross-system reconciliation

APPOINTMENT BOOKING IS INTEGRATION-DEPENDENT: Healthgrades appointment booking requires EHR or scheduling system integration; automated built-in scheduling assumption creates external scheduling system dependency; automated must integrate with provider's EHR or scheduling system for actual appointment booking

REVIEW DATA REQUIRES CAREFUL USAGE: Consumer patient reviews have legal and ethical considerations for provider marketing; automated unrestricted review republishing assumption creates legal risk; automated must comply with Healthgrades licensing terms for review data display

QUALITY RATINGS METHODOLOGY IS PROPRIETARY: Healthgrades quality ratings use proprietary methodology; automated equating with CMS or HEDIS quality assumption creates methodology confusion; automated must communicate Healthgrades rating methodology to end users
agent_readiness.security_notes: Healthcare provider data. HIPAA-where-applicable, CCPA, FTC. API key. US. Provider directory and healthcare consumer data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Healthcare provider directory. HIPAA-where-applicable, CCPA. API key. US. Provider and healthcare consumer data.
